author: ASTRA
description: Adds Google Drive-specific browser open semantics to the Shelf browser

governance.policyNotes: This package enables Google Drive-specific semantics on ASTRA's trusted Shelf browser bridge. It does not store Google credentials.

name: Google Drive Browser
setupGuide:
Enable this capability when a task needs to operate on Google Drive in the Shelf browser. It does not grant account access or store credentials; the user remains signed in directly in the browser.

What it adds:
- Google Drive file controls expose open-oriented analysis outcomes
- `astra-browser google-drive-open` opens a file by visible name and verifies editor navigation
- Drive row clicks are treated as selection unless an editor actually opens
